mapper.insert: insert into sc_resource_favorite(resource_id, user_id, create_by, create_time) values(#{resourceId}, #{userId}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from sc_resource_favorite where resource_id = #{param1} and user_id = #{param2}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sc_resource_favorite where resource_id = #{resourceId}

select r.resource_id, r.resource_name, r.resource_type, r.course_id, r.chapter_id, r.node_id, r.sort_no, r.uploader_id, r.author_name, r.publisher_name, r.target_user_type, r.file_url, r.cover_url, r.content_text, r.summary, r.audit_status, r.view_count, r.download_count, r.favorite_count, r.allow_comment, r.allow_rating, r.allow_share, r.quality_score, r.avg_rating, r.rating_count, r.comment_count, r.share_count, r.status, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from sc_resource_favorite f join sc_resource r on r.resource_id = f.resource_id where f.user_id = #{userId} order by f.create_time desc
